  "findings": [
    "Formwork has been erected and braced but forms are not oiled (release agent not applied)."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Clean form faces of any debris and apply an approved form-release agent (form oil) prior to reinforcement placement and concrete pouring."
  ],
  "rationale": "The formwork is structurally roughed in but cannot be approved for concrete placement because the form release agent has not been applied. Failing to oil the forms will cause the concrete to bond to the formwork, damaging the concrete surface during stripping.",
  "references": [
    "ACI 347 Section 5.2.1"
  ]
}
